title: Add support for parallel batch jobs in worker pool
body: Currently the worker pool serialises batch jobs. For the new ingestion pipeline we'll need to run up to 8 concurrent batches. Proposing we extend WorkerPool with a max_concurrency setting, default 1, and update the dispatcher to honour it. Would also want a simple back-pressure signal.

triage.likely_cause: Feature request — no production incident or customer impact; this is an engineering enhancement request for the new ingestion pipeline
recommended_actions: Route to engineering backlog for scoping — no immediate production impact
Define the back-pressure signal contract before beginning WorkerPool implementation
triage.reasoning: This issue is a feature request, not a production incident — no customers are affected and no service degradation is reported. No deploy is correlated and no runbook applies. P3 reflects the absence of immediate production impact. The proposal to add max_concurrency to WorkerPool is a valid engineering enhancement for the new ingestion pipeline and should be routed to the backlog for proper scoping.
